shot_type_and_framing: medium shot, centered horizontally with soap dispenser and cup placed side by side towards the lower half of the frame
camera_movement: slow lateral track from left to right
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, 50mm focal length style, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background
environment_description: minimalistic interior with a warm wooden surface supporting the items, a muted beige wall in the background, and a soft-focused potted plant adding subtle greenery
subject_description: a set of bathroom accessories including a soap dispenser with a chrome pump and a matching cup, both made of beige marble material featuring an intricate, carved geometric cutout pattern, placed on a matching rectangular marble tray
motion_behavior: natural steady camera movement maintaining focus and stable capture of the solid, stationary objects with slight reflections on metal parts
